synopsis: Appeal by Mr. and Mrs. Matthew Bernard against an excommunication censure imposed by the Session of Church of the Savior, Williamsville, New York (a Commission of Presbytery appointed by Ascension Presbytery). The Standing Judicial Commission determined the appeal was administratively out of order because it had not been heard by the next higher court (Ascension Presbytery) before being brought to the General Assembly. The Commission held that appeals must go to the next higher court, not the court of original jurisdiction.
